honesty: Evidence only. Points are layout-696 source anchors from GRAPHICS.DAT/ReDMCSB reconstruction; overlays do not claim sprite pixel parity.

source_provenance.record_struct: typedef struct { uint16 RecordType; int16 ParentRecordIndex; int16 Data1; int16 Data2; } LAYOUT_RECORD;  // 8 bytes
source_provenance.note: This is a verbatim dump of the original runtime layout table. It is NOT invented. Field meanings, record types, and resolver algorithm are documented by the cited ReDMCSB source files. Media variant targeted: I34E (DOS PC 3.4 English).
